description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:9-alpine Docker image. Define a single stage called build and a job named pages that runs in this stage. The pages job executes the commands `apk -U add nodejs-npm` and `sh ci/create_client_files.sh`, then publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. No services, caches, or additional variables are required. Deploy the generated site via GitLab Pages.
